name: Cottage Cheese Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until thoroughly blended.
2. Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Gradually add the sifted mixture to the creamed butter.
4. Form the dough into a loaf and chill overnight.
5. Slice the chilled loaf into thin slices.
6. Place the slices on an oiled baking sheet.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (400°F) for 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
40 servings
